Notes: Awesome climb! Thought provoking crux. Guidebook said it was a must do ��� guidebook was right

Followed Abby with Will. Quite an adventure of a climb!
Bootied one nut but lost another, ain't that just the way
Did the first three pitches of Old Ladies. Followed 1 and 2, led 3. Started dumping rain while setting up the rappel!
So sick!!! My proudest onsight to date. The top anchors were kinda hard to find, they were higher than I thought they'd be. Just above the second roof way up high
Did the first pitch, enjoyed the notch for a while, then beebopped down
Soloed most of the first pitch, got to a part I didn't think I'd feel comfortable down climbing, so I hung out a while then came down. A total zoo on the wall today
Onsighted P2 of Soler. So sick!!!
Followed first pitch to access P2 of Soler
Onsighted pitch 1. Followed the second two pitches of Skyline Traverse to gain Broadway ledge
